meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve can't monetize skills (Advanced Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome can't monetize skills. A Advanced-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity Project Template for Monetization
content.seo_description: Stop struggling to monetize your skills. Learn to use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to build high-value SaaS products at record speed.
content.answer_block: Monetization fails when you trade time for dollars instead of shipping products. The Antigravity template provides a production-ready boilerplate that abstracts infrastructure complexity. By pairing it with Claude Code, you automate the heavy lifting, allowing you to deploy high-margin SaaS applications in days rather than months.
content.intro:
The graveyard of freelance careers is filled with developers who built bespoke, unscalable solutions for low-ticket clients. You have the skills, but you are trapped in a cycle of manual labor, unable to bridge the gap between 'coding' and 'selling software.' The market doesn't pay for your time; it pays for the leverage you create.

It is time to pivot from being a service provider to an AI-powered product architect. By leveraging the Antigravity project template, you gain a battle-tested foundation that handles auth, payments, and database schemas out of the box. Combine this with the autonomous capabilities of Claude Code, and you transform your workflow from manual friction into a high-velocity production engine.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish the foundational architecture. This step ensures your project has the necessary environment variables and directory structure for a scalable SaaS.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project using the Antigravity SaaS boilerplate with Stripe integration and Supabase auth.

steps.title: Configure Business Logic with Claude
steps.description: Use Claude Code to inject your specific value proposition into the scaffold without rewriting the boilerplate code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the codebase and implement a subscription-based document generation feature using the existing Stripe webhook handlers.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'implement stripe subscription flow for document generation'

steps.title: Automate Database Migrations
steps.description: Sync your schema with your requirements. Claude Code ensures your database state matches the business logic defined in your UI.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate the necessary SQL migrations for a new 'Projects' table linked to 'User' profiles based on the current schema.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create migration for projects table with user constraints'

steps.title: Implement Production-Grade Auth
steps.description: Secure your application. The Antigravity template handles the heavy lifting; ensure your roles and permissions are correctly scoped.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure Row Level Security (RLS) policies for the Projects table to ensure users can only access their own data.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'setup RLS policies for projects table'

steps.title: Deploy to Production
steps.description: Ship the final product. Use the built-in CI/CD pipelines provided by Antigravity to push to Vercel/Fly.io.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Verify build readiness and generate the deployment configuration for a production environment.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'prepare deployment config for production'

pro_tips: Always keep your prompt library in a local /prompts folder; Claude Code can read these to maintain consistent style across multiple client projects.
Use the 'diff' feature in Claude Code to review every architectural change before committing; never let the AI push directly to production without a human sanity check.
Leverage the Antigravity 'mock-data' generator to build your UI components before the backend is fully finished to keep your momentum high.
Standardize your environment variables across all projects; use a .env.example file that includes all essential SaaS keys to reduce setup time to zero.
When a project scales, use Claude Code to refactor monolithic functions into micro-services; it is faster at identifying dependency chains than manual inspection.
content.next_steps: Once your first project is live, focus on building a 'Productized Service' landing page. Use your Antigravity template as a demonstration of your capability, and transition your clients from hourly billing to value-based pricing.
content.conversion_block: Stop building for others and start building for yourself. The tools are ready, the framework is proven, and your market is waiting. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
